title: senecio anethifolius subsp. brevibracteolatus
intro: Senecio anethifolius subsp. brevibracteolatus, also known as the White Fleabane or Brevibracteolate Fleabane, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the daisy family, native to South Africa. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which can help to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Senecio anethifolius subsp. brevibracteolatus include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe coughs, and aid in the treatment of skin conditions. Traditional herbal preparations of the plant include infusions and tinctures, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
